name: Aparna S.
text: Ms Kathi feels like stepping into a living library. Cozy, elegant, and endlessly inspiring.

name: Ranjit K.
text: A hidden gem in Khan Market. The warmth of the staff matches the glow of the lamps.

name: Meera D.
text: I always find something magical here. The maze of shelves is a dream.

name: Sahil P.
text: Found a rare Tagore edition I had been searching for years. Ms Kathi never disappoints!

name: Nisha R.
text: The ambience is unmatched. I visit every weekend just to browse. Bought four books last time.
